scripts.build:all: nest build api-gateway && nest build auth && nest build email && nest build user && nest build message && nest build post && nest build file
scripts.prisma:generate:all: yarn prisma:generate:auth && yarn prisma:generate:user && yarn prisma:generate:message && yarn prisma:generate:post
scripts.create-migration:auth: docker-compose -f docker-compose.migrate.yml up -d && sleep 5 && cross-env AUTH_DATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres:password@localhost:5433/social_network?schema=auth npx prisma migrate dev --name init --schema apps/auth/prisma/schema.prisma --create-only && docker-compose -f docker-compose.migrate.yml down
scripts.create-migration:user: docker-compose -f docker-compose.migrate.yml up -d && sleep 5 && cross-env USER_DATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres:password@localhost:5433/social_network?schema=user npx prisma migrate dev --name init --schema apps/user/prisma/schema.prisma --create-only && docker-compose -f docker-compose.migrate.yml down
scripts.create-migration:message: docker-compose -f docker-compose.migrate.yml up -d && sleep 5 && cross-env MESSAGE_DATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres:password@localhost:5433/social_network?schema=message npx prisma migrate dev --name init --schema apps/message/prisma/schema.prisma --create-only && docker-compose -f docker-compose.migrate.yml down
scripts.create-migration:post: docker-compose -f docker-compose.migrate.yml up -d && sleep 5 && cross-env POST_DATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres:password@localhost:5433/social_network?schema=post npx prisma migrate dev --name init --schema apps/post/prisma/schema.prisma --create-only && docker-compose -f docker-compose.migrate.yml down
scripts.docker:deploy:base:build: yarn docker:build:base:build && yarn docker:tag:base:build && yarn docker:push:base:build
scripts.docker:deploy:base:run: yarn docker:build:base:run && yarn docker:tag:base:run && yarn docker:push:base:run
scripts.deploy:api-gateway: yarn docker:build:api-gateway && yarn docker:tag:api-gateway && yarn docker:push:api-gateway
scripts.deploy:auth: yarn docker:build:auth && yarn docker:tag:auth && yarn docker:push:auth
scripts.deploy:email: yarn docker:build:email && yarn docker:tag:email && yarn docker:push:email
scripts.deploy:user: yarn docker:build:user && yarn docker:tag:user && yarn docker:push:user
scripts.deploy:message: yarn docker:build:message && yarn docker:tag:message && yarn docker:push:message
scripts.deploy:post: yarn docker:build:post && yarn docker:tag:post && yarn docker:push:post
scripts.deploy:file: yarn docker:build:file && yarn docker:tag:file && yarn docker:push:file
scripts.deploy:all: yarn deploy:api-gateway && yarn deploy:auth && yarn deploy:email && yarn deploy:user && yarn deploy:message && yarn deploy:post && yarn deploy:file
